'''jadaha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oedemerid|oedemerid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-d-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oedemerid|oedemerid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| jadaha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jædæhæth|jædæhæth]] || [[word:jædæhæj|jædæhæj]] || [[word:jædæhæsh|jædæhæsh]] || [[word:jædæhæ|jædæhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jadadahath|jadadahath]] || [[word:jadadahaj|jadadahaj]] || [[word:jadadahash|jadadahash]] || [[word:jadadaha|jadadaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jadahath|jadahath]] || [[word:jadahaj|jadahaj]] || [[word:jadahash|jadahash]] || [[word:jadaha|jadaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jadafhath|jadafhath]] || [[word:jadafhaj|jadafhaj]] || [[word:jadafhash|jadafhash]] || [[word:jadafhaf|jadafhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jadahatha|jadahatha]] || [[word:jadahaja|jadahaja]] || [[word:jadahasha|jadahasha]] || [[word:jadahaka|jadahaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jadahath|jadahath]] || [[word:jadahaj|jadahaj]] || [[word:jadahash|jadahash]] || [[word:jadaha|jadaha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jadahathal|jadahathal]] || [[word:jadahajal|jadahajal]] || [[word:jadahashal|jadahashal]] || [[word:jadahakal|jadahakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jadahathatha|jadahathatha]] || [[word:jadahajaja|jadahajaja]] || [[word:jadahashasha|jadahashasha]] || [[word:jadahaka|jadahaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jadahathan|jadahathan]] || [[word:jadahajan|jadahajan]] || [[word:jadahashan|jadahashan]] || [[word:jadahakan|jadahakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jadahathaoro|jadahathaoro]] || [[word:jadahajaoro|jadahajaoro]] || [[word:jadahashaoro|jadahashaoro]] || [[word:jadahakaoro|jadahakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
